case_title: FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION VS. LISA BERNARD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION SERVED JUN-02-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BERNARD, LISA
